productDisplayName: Highlander Men Blue Checked Haig Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionBlue check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has grey and white accents, denim tape detailing on inseam of the collar, white stitch detailing, patch pocket on the left chest, full length buttoned placket that has a denim panel and brand tab on the facing side, sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  blue check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up for a different look. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-17.5 "
